c2c_pkt_header Struct Reference
[gxpci PCIe and StreamIO Data Transfer API]

We need to embed a chip-to-chip packet header in the beginning of each packet for the following reasons: -- to transport the size of packet data payload to the receiver, in the absence of dedicated metadata packets. More...


Data Fields

uint32_t ready
 Flag indicating the packet availability.
uint32_t size
 Packet payload size, excluding this header.

Detailed Description

We need to embed a chip-to-chip packet header in the beginning of each packet for the following reasons: -- to transport the size of packet data payload to the receiver, in the absence of dedicated metadata packets.

The sender application should set the data payload size in this header. The PCIe packet payload size is the data payload size plus the c2c_pkt_header_t size. -- to include a packet availability flag informing the receiver of the the packet arrival. This flag should also be set by the sender application.

Field Documentation

uint32_t c2c_pkt_header::ready

Flag indicating the packet availability.

uint32_t c2c_pkt_header::size

Packet payload size, excluding this header.

The documentation for this struct was generated from the following file:
